title: CBDT to Integrate Foreign Financial Data in AIS and Form 26AS
content:
# CBDT to Integrate Foreign Financial Data in AIS and Form 26AS

Ek important update hai for all taxpayers! The Central Board of Direct Taxes (CBDT) ne ek naya order announce kiya hai, jiske through foreign financial information ab Annual Information Statement (AIS) aur Form 26AS mein dikhegi. This move is aimed at increasing transparency and improving tax compliance.

Here are the key details:

*   **What's New:** CBDT ne Directorate General of Income Tax (Systems), Delhi ko authorize kiya hai ki woh Automatic Exchange of Information (AEOI) framework ke under receive hui foreign financial information ko taxpayers ke AIS aur Form 26AS mein upload kare.
*   **Order Details:** This is via CBDT Order F.No. 225/73/2025-ITA-II, dated July 08, 2026.
*   **Information Covered:**
    *   For the periods January 1, 2022, to December 31, 2022, and January 1, 2023, to December 31, 2024, this information will be uploaded within 90 days from the date of the order (July 8, 2026).
    *   For the period January 1, 2025, to December 31, 2025, the information will be uploaded within 90 days from the end of the month in which it is received.
*   **Impact on AIS/26AS:** This will make foreign financial information directly available to taxpayers, helping them reconcile their overseas income and assets with their tax filings. AIS will also include information in Form 168, which is the new Annual Information Statement as per Income-tax Rules, 2026, replacing Form 26AS for future periods. However, for current filings (AY 2026-27), Form 26AS continues to apply.
*   **Procedure:** The Director General of Income-tax (Systems), Delhi, is also authorized to specify the procedures, formats, and standards for uploading this information.

Taxpayers with foreign financial assets or income should proactively review their AIS and Form 26AS to ensure all disclosures are consistent with their Income Tax Returns (ITRs).

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://incometax.gov.in/iec/foportal/latest-news)

*Published on: 10 July 2026*
